Community Management

Discord and Facebook Group engagement scripts, moderation templates, and daily discussion prompts

Community Management

Ready-to-use scripts for Discord server and Facebook Group management. Includes channel structure, welcome messages, daily prompts, and moderation templates.

Discord Server Setup

Recommended Channel Structure

B2B Channels

📋 B2B PROPERTY MANAGERS
├── #pm-welcome (Rules, Getting Started)
├── #pm-portfolio-talk (Multi-property management)
├── #pm-roi-showcase (Energy savings data)
├── #pm-tech-questions (Installation, troubleshooting)
└── #pm-feature-requests (Vote on enterprise features)

🏨 B2B HOSPITALITY
├── #hospitality-welcome
├── #guest-experience (Automation ideas for hotels/Airbnb)
├── #hospitality-roi (Revenue impact discussions)
└── #hospitality-integrations (PMS, booking platforms)

B2C Channels

B2C HOMEOWNERS
├── #home-welcome (Rules, Getting Started)
├── #setup-help (Installation questions)
├── #automation-ideas (Share your favorite automations)
├── #energy-savings (Post your bill reductions)
├── #show-off (Home setup photos/videos)
└── #smart-home-refugees (For those fleeing SmartThings/Nest)

🔧 TECHNICAL
├── #integrations (Nest, Ring, Philips Hue compatibility)
├── #feature-requests (Vote on upcoming features)
└── #beta-testing (Early access program)

📢 ANNOUNCEMENTS
├── #campaign-updates (Launch day, stretch goals, shipping)
├── #media-mentions (Press, reviews, YouTuber coverage)
└── #weekly-digest (Curated highlights)

Welcome Messages

B2B Property Manager Welcome (Auto-DM)

Hey [Name]! 👋 

Welcome to the HeyZack B2B community—where property managers and hospitality 
operators swap war stories and smart building strategies.

**Quick Start:**
1. Head to #pm-portfolio-talk and introduce yourself
2. Check #pm-roi-showcase to see real energy savings
3. Got a building challenge? Drop it in #pm-tech-questions

**Exclusive Perk:** B2B backers get priority access to our portfolio 
dashboard beta.

— The HeyZack Team

B2C Homeowner Welcome (Auto-DM)

Welcome to the HeyZack family!

We're the smart home community for people who've been burned by buggy 
ecosystems and false promises. You're in good company.

**Start Here:**
1. Introduce yourself in #home-welcome
2. Peek at #show-off to see what's possible
3. Got setup questions? #setup-help has your back

— Team HeyZack

Server Pin Post (Rules)

— **COMMUNITY RULES & ETIQUETTE**

**The Golden Rules:**
1. **Be Helpful, Not Judgmental** – No "stupid questions" exist here
2. **Share Real Results** – Energy savings? Post your before/after bills
3. **Stay On-Topic** – Use the right channels
4. **No Spam** – Promoting your own products = instant ban
5. **Respect Privacy** – Don't share others' personal info

**Community Perks:**
• Early access to beta features
• Direct line to product team
• Exclusive backer-only stretch goals
• Monthly "Setup of the Month" spotlight ($100 credit)

**Need Help?** Ping @CommunityTeam or DM a moderator.

Daily Discussion Prompts (Sample Week)

DayChannelPrompt
Mon#pm-portfolio-talk”Introduce yourself! What’s the #1 thing driving you crazy about your current automation?”
Tue#pm-portfolio-talk”What’s the most expensive service call HeyZack could have prevented?”
Wed#home-welcome”How many different apps are you juggling right now?”
Thu#energy-savings”Energy bill confession time: What’s your highest monthly bill?”
Fri#show-off”Fun Friday: Show us your setup—the good, the bad, and the ‘why did I buy this?’”
Sat#automation-ideas”What automation do you WISH existed?”
Sun#energy-savings”If HeyZack saves you 25%, what would you do with that extra money?”

Facebook Group Management

Welcome Post Template

👋 New to the HeyZack community?

Drop a comment with:
1. Where you're based
2. Your smart home setup (or what you're planning)
3. Your #1 frustration with current tech

We're all about solving real problems, not selling hype. Looking forward 
to learning together!

Engagement Rules

  • Respond to new posts within 4 hours
  • Pin high-quality user content weekly
  • Cross-promote Discord for real-time chat
  • Feature “Member of the Week” success stories
